content:
# Dark neon Liquid Glass implementation parameters - Overview

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: premium card, dark mode hero, selected state, Pro plan card, AI control panel, neon status tile
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/dark-neon-liquid-glass-parameters

Visual traits:
- black translucent glass
- cyan edge glint
- magenta rim glow
- orange caustic
- white text
- deep shadow
- neon active ring

Use when:
- premium card
- dark mode hero
- selected state
- Pro plan card
- AI control panel
- neon status tile

Avoid when:
- long reading area
- standard enterprise CRUD
- legal/medical workflow
- low contrast mode
- large repeated list rows

AI summary: Dark neon Liquid Glass parameters: dark fill rgba(8,10,16,0.68-0.78), rim rgba white 0.18-0.32, cyan glint rgba(34,211,238,0.28-0.46), magenta rgba(217,70,239,0.22-0.40), orange rgba(251,146,60,0.16-0.32), deep shadows, inset gloss, active neon rings.

source_name: Dark neon Liquid Glass implementation parameters
content:
# Dark neon Liquid Glass implementation parameters - Layout Rules

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: premium card, dark mode hero, selected state, Pro plan card, AI control panel, neon status tile
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/dark-neon-liquid-glass-parameters

- Use dark neon glass as an accent or premium area, not the default surface for the whole page.
- Keep text white or near-white and use muted gray only for secondary copy with sufficient contrast.
- Place neon glints near edges/corners and icon rings, not directly behind body text.
- Pair dark neon with lighter surrounding surfaces so it reads as intentional emphasis.

AI summary: Dark neon Liquid Glass parameters: dark fill rgba(8,10,16,0.68-0.78), rim rgba white 0.18-0.32, cyan glint rgba(34,211,238,0.28-0.46), magenta rgba(217,70,239,0.22-0.40), orange rgba(251,146,60,0.16-0.32), deep shadows, inset gloss, active neon rings.

content:
# Dark neon Liquid Glass implementation parameters - Accessibility Notes

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: premium card, dark mode hero, selected state, Pro plan card, AI control panel, neon status tile
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/dark-neon-liquid-glass-parameters

- Use text colors around #F8FAFC or #FFFFFF for primary labels on dark glass.
- Avoid relying on cyan/magenta glow as the only selected/success indicator.
- Check contrast after backdrop blur because background color can bleed through.

AI summary: Dark neon Liquid Glass parameters: dark fill rgba(8,10,16,0.68-0.78), rim rgba white 0.18-0.32, cyan glint rgba(34,211,238,0.28-0.46), magenta rgba(217,70,239,0.22-0.40), orange rgba(251,146,60,0.16-0.32), deep shadows, inset gloss, active neon rings.

source_name: Dark neon Liquid Glass implementation parameters
content:
# Dark neon Liquid Glass implementation parameters - Implementation Hints

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: premium card, dark mode hero, selected state, Pro plan card, AI control panel, neon status tile
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/dark-neon-liquid-glass-parameters

- Base dark glass: rgba(8,10,16,0.68) to rgba(8,10,16,0.78); strong default rgba(8,10,16,0.72).
- Secondary dark glass: rgba(15,23,42,0.58) to rgba(15,23,42,0.70).
- Backdrop filter: blur(18px) saturate(160%) for cards; blur(24px) saturate(180%) for hero/premium surfaces.
- White rim: border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18) to rgba(255,255,255,0.32); hover can rise to 0.42.
- Cyan glint: rgba(34,211,238,0.28) to rgba(34,211,238,0.46), usually radial-gradient at top-left or icon edge.
- Magenta glint: rgba(217,70,239,0.22) to rgba(217,70,239,0.40), usually bottom-right or active ring.
- Orange glint: rgba(251,146,60,0.16) to rgba(251,146,60,0.32), use sparingly for warm caustic highlights.
- Deep shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(2,6,23,0.34) plus 0 8px 24px rgba(15,23,42,0.22).
- Inset gloss: inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.22), inset 0 -1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.35).
- Neon active ring: box-shadow 0 0 0 1px rgba(34,211,238,0.38), 0 0 24px rgba(217,70,239,0.24).
- Pressed state: reduce translateY by 1px, increase inset dark shadow, and slightly reduce outer glow.
- Disabled state: background rgba(15,23,42,0.38), border rgba(255,255,255,0.12), text rgba(248,250,252,0.45), remove neon glints.

AI summary: Dark neon Liquid Glass parameters: dark fill rgba(8,10,16,0.68-0.78), rim rgba white 0.18-0.32, cyan glint rgba(34,211,238,0.28-0.46), magenta rgba(217,70,239,0.22-0.40), orange rgba(251,146,60,0.16-0.32), deep shadows, inset gloss, active neon rings.
